booking_route_13401,2,,,7,08:00:00,1,17:30:00,,"BAT Lift provides demand-responsive transportation to seniors and individuals with disabilities. To request a ride, call 541-766-6700 at least one day ahead of your trip. Riders must qualify for eligibility in advance by calling 541-766-6318.",,,541-766-6700,https://bat.bentoncountyor.gov/bat-lift/,
